g.text: The Guard is the decision-maker. Guard manually verifies ID card (Student ID / Aadhaar / DL), approves entry, then logs it.
System is a logger, not gatekeeper. Unknown plates auto-registered. VehicleID = NULL means on foot.
Guard verifies ID → enters memberID + plate + type → system finds/creates vehicle → logs PersonVisit + VehicleVisit + updates occupancy
Guard verifies ID → enters memberID only → system logs PersonVisit with VehicleID = NULL → no VehicleVisit → updates occupancy
Guard enters memberID → finds active visit → updates PersonVisit exit → if vehicle linked, updates VehicleVisit exit → decrements occupancy
SELECT PersonVisit WHERE ExitTime IS NULL
[Visit had a vehicle (VehicleID IS NOT NULL)]
▪ Guard decides entry (visual ID check) → system only logs
▪ Unknown vehicle plate → auto-register (INSERT new Vehicle)
▪ VehicleID = NULL → person came on foot
▪ Guard selects vehicle type from dropdown (PrivateCar, Bike, Taxi, Truck, Bus)
▪ Entry and exit gates can be different (separate FK columns)
